log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Sea Elf — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 6 falling damage. HP: 172/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Sea Elf — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 15] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 167/178
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Sea Elf — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 25 damage. Sea Elf — Armored Tank HP: 34/59
Young Red Dragon attacks Sea Elf — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Sea Elf — Armored Tank HP: 12/59
Young Red Dragon attacks Sea Elf — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 20] MISS.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Sea Elf — Armored Tank's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Sea Elf — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Sea Elf — Armored Tank.
→ Sea Elf — Armored Tank healed for 6 HP. HP: 18/59
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Sea Elf — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 20] MISS.
Young Red Dragon attacks Sea Elf — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Sea Elf — Armored Tank HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
